batch_objective: Review the integrity and functionality of the application using the dev-flow process and specialized agents (architect, software-dev, qa-reviewer, security-reviewer, docs-writer).

decisions_log.notes: Iteration 1. US-001..US-006 + HLR-001..HLR-006 + 10 LLRs + 25 TCs.
Iteration 2. US-001 expanded; HLR-007/008/009 + 7 LLRs + 11 TCs added.
User approved iteration 2 and instructed advance to Phase 2.
Iter 1. Dispatched architect + qa-reviewer + security-reviewer in parallel.
Iter 1 result: 2 blockers (S-001, S-002) + 16 majors + 11 minors. Blockers force rollback to Phase 1.

Iteration 3. Auto-applied recommended scope: HLR-005 rebuild into 5 LLRs (closes S-001, S-002, S-004, S-006, S-007, A-012); HLR-007 split into 007a/007b (closes A-003, A-007); Finding schema in Â§1.3 (closes A-002, Q-001, Q-006); LLR-002.3 message scrubbing (closes S-005); round-trip â†’ test (unit) (closes Q-003); LLR-001.1/.2 fixed (A-010, A-011); demo capture contract (Q-004); enumeration-based orchestration acceptance (Q-005); plus all 11 minors. shall/should verified clean (0 stray).
User approved iteration 3 and instructed advance to Phase 2.
Iter 2. Dispatching architect + qa-reviewer + security-reviewer in parallel for closure verification + new-issue scan.

Iter 2 result: all 29 prior findings closed (incl. both blockers S-001/S-002). 0 new blockers, 4 new majors (A-N02 LLR-005.3 increment binding, Q-N01 TC-047 manual Windows run, Q-N02 TC-090 split, Q-N03 TC-064/065 overlap), 11 new minors + 1 informational. shall/should clean. Verdict: pass-with-fixes.
User approved iter 2 verdict and instructed advance to Phase 3. Four majors logged in 02-review.md Â§Deferrals per Â§5.3 acceptance criterion.
Phase 3 implementation. Increment plan presented; awaiting user approval of increment 1 (LLR-005.3 product-behaviour change in workspace.py).
User approved increment 1 (LLR-005.3) and confirmed no active branches. Inactive web-UI experiment branch noted, will not be touched. Dispatching software-dev.

Software-dev returned. 4 source/test files + 1 packet = 5 files. workspace.py hardened (containment + symlink/junction + 256MB cap); app.py updated 6 call sites; tests/test_tui_workspace.py adds TC-044/045/046/047 (all green on Windows; TC-047 will skip on Linux CI). 1 pre-existing test (test_save_project_writes_under_chosen_parent) red by design â€” disclosed.
User approved increment 1 and dispatched increment 1.5 to fix the broken pre-existing test.

Increment 1.5 inline: renamed test_save_project_writes_under_chosen_parent â†’ test_save_project_writes_under_workarea; parent = ensure (workarea). 1 file + 1 packet. Full suite: 180 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped. CI green.
User approved increment 2 (fixture builders + Textual snapshot harness skeleton). Dispatching software-dev.

Increment 2: 3 files. Three deterministic builders in conftest.py (matching make_large_* convention; no static tests/fixtures/ dir). Snapshot harness skeleton + smoke test in test_tui_app.py via App.run_test() and asyncio.run wrapper. 181 passed / 0 failed / 2 skipped. Doc-vs-code drift on tests/fixtures/ path noted (deferred to Phase 6 docs).
User approved increment 2 and dispatched increment 3 (LLR-002.3 issue-message scrubbing).

Increment 3: 3 files. _scrub_issue_message + ValidationIssue.__post_init__ in model.py (centralised scrub for all 17 call sites). 6 new tests under TestIssueMessageScrubbing (TC-090.a x3 + TC-090.b x2 + negative). 187 passed / 0 failed / 2 skipped. Closes S-005, Q-N02 (test-code level), S-N03; A-N04 partial (doc edit deferred).
User approved increment 3 and dispatched increment 4 (LLR-002.1 severity round-trip parametrised test).

Increment 4: 2 files (new tests/test_color_policy_round_trip.py + packet). 16 new tests: forward round-trip (5), bidirectional invariant (3), colour-name contract (2), idempotency (5), large_project integration (1). 203 passed / 0 failed / 2 skipped. No divergence found â€” color_policy.py NOT modified. Closes R-3.
User approved increment 4 and dispatched increment 5 (LLR-007.2 engine-side cross-file co-emission tests TC-062.a..h).

Increment 5: 2 files. 8 tests under TestCrossFileCompatibilityCoEmission. 7 pass + 1 xfail (TC-062.a, F-7.2-01 engine gap). 210 passed / 1 xfailed / 0 failed / 2 skipped. Active alias policy = 'warn' recorded for LLR-007.3. Public-contract codes from CLAUDE.md confirmed unchanged.

User approved increment 5 and chose to defer F-7.2-01 (major) + F-7.2-02 (minor) to follow-up batch. Findings logged in 02-review.md Â§Deferrals. Dispatching increment 6 (LLR-007.4 panel-render snapshot tests TC-064/065 over the 8 classes).

Q-N03 closed via Option A (stand-in comment for TC-064). No new Findings â€” engineâ†’panel render path drops nothing.
User approved increment 6 and dispatched increment 7 (workspace + accessor + hex-view unit tests for LLR-005.1, 005.2, 005.4, 005.5, 006.1, 003.2).

Increment 7: 4 files. 38 new tests across test_tui_workspace.py (18), test_tui_public_api.py (7 new), test_tui_hexview.py (6). 255 passed / 3 xfailed (incl. new F-7.7-07) / 0 failed / 2 skipped. 6 new Findings: F-7.7-07 (major, validate_characteristic dict-spread bug), F-7.7-02/03/04 (minor, sanitiser gaps for reserved names / 64-char cap / Unicode confusables), F-7.7-05 (minor, validate_project_files symlink follow-through), F-7.7-06 (minor, schema/memory/in_memory triplet doc-vs-code drift).

User approved increment 7 and chose to defer all 6 Findings (F-7.7-07 major + 5 minors) to follow-up batch. Findings logged in 02-review.md Â§Deferrals. Dispatching increment 8 (LLR-009.1 + LLR-009.2 determinism + coverage-metrics tests).

Increment 8: 2 files (test_validation_engine.py extension + packet). 4 new tests under TestEngineDeterminism (TC-081) + TestCoverageMetricsCorrectness (TC-082). 259 passed / 3 xfailed / 0 failed / 2 skipped. NO new Findings â€” engine is deterministic on large_project; CoverageMetrics fully populated. HLR-009 closed; R-5 promoted to executable assertion.
User approved increment 8 and dispatched increment 9 (consolidated inspection-method audit matrices for LLR-001.1, 001.2, 002.2, 003.1, 004.1, 007.1, 007.3, 008.1, 008.2). Last Phase 3 increment.

Increment 9: 1 file (the packet, 481 lines, 9 audit matrices). 41 R-* rows: 28 confirmed / 5 promote / 2 drift / 6 unknown. 10 new Findings (F-9.01-01, F-9.02-01..03, F-9.03-01/02, F-9.04-01..03, F-9.07-01, F-9.09-01) â€” all minor or doc. User approved Phase 3 close. Total Phase 3: 17 testable LLRs automated + 9 inspection LLRs with audit matrices. 18 Findings open at Phase 3 close (2 major: F-7.2-01, F-7.7-07; 16 minor/doc); all logged in 02-review.md Â§Deferrals or increment-009.md Â§10. Advance to Phase 4.
Phase 4 iter 1. Dispatching qa-reviewer to execute validation strategy from 01-requirements.md Â§5 and produce 04-validation.md.

Phase 4 iter 1 done. Pytest baseline matches: 259 passed / 0 failed / 3 xfailed (TC-062.a, TC-065.a, TC-052) / 2 skipped â€” no drift, no unexpected failures. 60 TCs evaluated: 49 pass / 3 xfail / 11 gap / 0 fail. Â§5.3 bullets: 11 of 14 pass, 3 gap. 18 open Findings (3 major + 15 minor) â€” zero blocker. Verdict: gap (pass-with-known-gaps). Gaps: A=TC-032 demo evidence (9 packs missing, ~1 hour), B=TC-047 Windows stdout re-attach (~5 min), C=Linux-CI confirmation TC-044/045/046 (automatic on next CI run).
User approved gap-verdict and advanced to Phase 5.
Phase 5 iter 1. Dispatching architect + qa-reviewer co-authors in parallel for post-mortem.

Phase 5 iter 1 done. 05-postmortem.md assembled from architect + qa-reviewer parallel sections. 5 candidate follow-up batches consolidated (B-2A engine, B-2B workspace, B-2C services, B-2D doc numbering, B-2E demo+promotions+drift). 7 process learnings captured. Co-authors recommend close-batch.

Phase 6 iter 1. Dispatching docs-writer (traceability-matrix.md, functionality.md, diagrams/) + presentation-builder (executive-summary.md) in parallel.

Phase 6 iter 1 done. 4 files: traceability-matrix.md (246 lines, 60 TC rows), functionality.md (288 lines), diagrams/architecture.md (276 lines, 3 Mermaid diagrams), executive-summary.md (797 words). 111 cross-references between artefacts. Awaiting user gate.
